result.notes: Two-leg bus bridge; capacity-constrained at peak.

citations.snippet: DSR-2026-001 L1 full shutdown; shuttle bridging activated.
Shuttle bus bridging policy: 20-minute headway, capacity caveats.

text: Yes — shuttle buses are bridging the L1 outage (DSR-2026-001 / INC-2001) in two legs: S-Jamaica to S-Hicksville (~45 min ride) and S-Hicksville to S-Mineola (~15 min ride), each at a 20-minute headway. See runbook RB-12-shuttle-bus-bridging for capacity caveats and rider-comms guidance.
